title: BAPPERIDA Agency Web System
description: Developed a web system for BAPPERIDA (Regional Development Planning, Research, and Innovation Agency) for document management, information publication, and online proposal submission.
longDescription: A web-based information system designed to support administrative document management, publish regional research and innovation findings, and facilitate online proposal submissions from the community. Built using Laravel and MySQL in collaboration with Bomi Developers, this system enhances transparency, speeds up information distribution, and streamlines public digital service administration.

title: SIMAPP Mappi Scholarship System
description: Academic and administrative monitoring web system for scholarship recipient students in collaboration with the regional government of Mappi Regency.
longDescription: Developed the SIMAPP web system, serving as an administration, scholarship, and academic tracking platform for Mappi Regency scholarship students. This system connects academic advisors, relevant agencies, and the regional government of Mappi to monitor student academic progress in real-time, improve data archiving transparency, and simplify scholarship eligibility verification.
